creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
Created attachment 241068
Updated patch to check if media is attached and active

Well, since it is just 12.5 years since I submitted that patch, it was fresh in my mind!

I looked at the code.  While it has been reworked in the intervening time, it still does not appear to have any media presence checks.  So I think this patch is probably still useful.

At the moment, I cannot actually test things, because I am nomading again and have only a wifi laptop with me.  No access to a box with wired Ethernet.

However, I have updated the patch so that it applies and compiles with the current code.  Perhaps others can verify it is still useful and works.
